calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Continued To Feb-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Catherine Kim for petitioner Kuen Young Chang.

Ms. Kim reported that the funds which had previously been moved out of the estate account by the surviving spouse have now all been returned, as set forth in her recent supplemental filing. The Court noted that the submission was too late for a review prior to the hearing, and that a review of the recent submission would be necessary. The matter was continued to February 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Feb-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Kim appeared by telephone for Keun Chang.

Ms. Kim stated that they are trying to do final distribution, that the stock options have all been sold, that she filed as part of the supplement that the surviving spouse had agreed to hold the funds because the Administrator received some tax advice and that the Administrator is in control of those funds. The Court questions how the Administrator could control funds that are in someone else's name and stated that the money should be transferred into the Estate. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Accounting, etc. is continued to February 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of proof of transfer of funds.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
